functions.label: fromStoredDataView
description:
Convert a stored search-source `index` value (saved object / serialized search source)
to the as-code data view shape.
signature: | null | undefined) => Readonly<{} & { type: "data_view_reference"; ref_id: string; }> | Readonly<{ time_field?: string | undefined; field_settings?: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined; } & { type: "data_view_spec"; index_pattern: string; }>

functions.label: fromStoredFields
description:
Convert stored field metadata maps from DataViewSpec to as-code field representations.

Produces `field_settings` where runtime fields appear inline (with `type` and optional `script`)
alongside indexed-field display overrides.
signature: | undefined) => Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined

children.label: runtimeFields
description: Map of field name → `{ type, script, fields? }` from DataViewSpec

children.label: fieldFormats
description: Map of field name → display format `{ id, params }` from DataViewSpec

children.label: fieldAttrs
description: Map of field name → `{ customLabel, customDescription }` from DataViewSpec

returnComment: `field_settings` map, or `undefined` when there is nothing to persist

functions.label: toStoredDataView
description:
Convert an as-code data view back to a stored search-source `index` value
(string id for a referenced data view, or inline {@link DataViewSpec} fields).

functions.label: toStoredFieldAttributes
description:
Convert as-code `field_settings` to the `fieldAttrs` entry of a DataViewSpec.
Indexed field settings without attrs are skipped. Runtime fields and composite runtime subfields
always produce an entry (possibly empty) to preserve current stored shape.
Composite subfields are written under the fully-qualified `parent.child` key.
signature: (fieldSettings: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined) =>

children.label: fieldSettings
description: Map of field name → indexed overrides or inline runtime definition
signature: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined

returnComment: A `fieldAttrs` object suitable for use in a DataViewSpec

functions.label: toStoredFieldFormats
description:
Convert as-code `field_settings` to the `fieldFormats` entry of a DataViewSpec.
Only fields that declare a `format` are included. Composite subfields are written
under the fully-qualified `parent.child` key.
signature: (fieldSettings: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined) => Record<string,

functions.label: toStoredRuntimeFields
description:
Convert as-code `field_settings` to the `runtimeFieldMap` entry of a DataViewSpec.
Composite fields are expanded into a `fields` record keyed by subfield name.
Script source strings are wrapped in the `{ source }` shape expected by the stored format.
signature: (fieldSettings: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & {}> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; } & { type: "composite"; fields: Record<string, Readonly<{ format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>>; }> | Readonly<{ script?: string | undefined; format?: Readonly<{ params?: any; } & { type: string; }> | undefined; custom_label?: string | undefined; custom_description?: string | undefined; } & { type: "boolean" | "geo_point" | "ip" | "keyword" | "date" | "long" | "double"; }>> | undefined) => Record<string,
